agent.description: Identity and prompt of the agent.

displayName.description: Human-friendly name, Unicode allowed. Rendered as the ui.giantswarm.io/display-name annotation on the Agent. Size-limited so it cannot become a description.

name.description: Technical resource name (DNS-1123). Defaults to the Helm release name.

runtime.description: kagent runtime for the agent. Mirrors the Agent CRD's spec.declarative.runtime enum.

annotations.description: Extra annotations merged next to the display-name annotation.

extraAgentSpec.description: Escape hatch: deep-merged over the curated Agent spec (this wins), so any kagent Agent field is reachable when the curated surface omits something.

extraTools.description: Additional raw kagent tool entries appended after the muster gateway.

global.description: Global values shared between all subcharts
global.$comment: Added automatically by 'helm schema' to allow this chart to be used as a Helm dependency, as the `additionalProperties` setting would otherwise collide with Helm's special 'global' values key.

labels.description: Extra labels merged over the standard set, e.g. tenant/owner dimensions.

modelConfig.description: Which platform-admin-provisioned ModelConfig the agent uses, referenced by name. kagent resolves it in the agent's own namespace. The chart never creates or mutates a ModelConfig, and tenants never handle LLM credentials.

name.description: Name of the admin-provisioned ModelConfig in the agent's namespace.

muster.description: The platform's shared muster gateway, referenced cross-namespace. The RemoteMCPServer is admin-owned; its spec.allowedNamespaces must admit this agent's namespace.

allowedHeaders.description: HTTP headers forwarded to the gateway.

enabled.description: Wire the shared muster gateway into the agent's tools.

apiGroup.description: API group of the referenced resource.

stsWellKnownUri.description: OAuth authorization server discovery URI of muster's STS. Leave empty (the default): under the platform's dex-only trust model (muster does not sign tokens) the propagated caller token is presented directly as the MCP bearer and no exchange happens — a configured URI would attempt an RFC 8693 exchange that muster refuses. Set only against a muster that runs in JWT mode; its in-cluster discovery URL is http://muster.agentic-platform.svc.cluster.local:8090/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server

toolNames.description: Set to narrow the tool surface; leave empty for all tools. muster's tools are dynamic and no toolNames means no tool filter — the agent gets every tool the gateway exposes.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for agent pod scheduling.

resources.description: Compute resources of the agent deployment.

skills.description: kagent-native skills, pulled by the skills-init container and mounted under /skills. Prefer immutable refs (image tag/digest, git tag/SHA) in long-lived installs; git branches are a development convenience.

gitRefs.description: Git repository references for development iteration.
